\boxed{
\begin{aligned}
\mathcal{Z}[J,\eta,\bar{\eta}]
&=
\frac{1}{\mathcal{N}}
\int
\mathcal{D}g_{\mu\nu}\,
\mathcal{D}A_{\mu}^{a}\,
\mathcal{D}\phi\,
\mathcal{D}\phi^{\dagger}\,
\mathcal{D}\psi\,
\mathcal{D}\bar{\psi}\;
\Delta_{\mathrm{FP}}[A,g]\,
\delta\!\left[\mathcal{F}^{a}(A)\right]\,
\delta\!\left[\mathcal{G}^{\mu}(g)\right]
\\[4pt]
&\quad\times
\exp\Bigg\{
\frac{i}{\hbar}
\Bigg[
\int_{\mathcal{M}} d^{4}x\,\sqrt{-g}\,
\Bigg(
\frac{1}{2\kappa}\bigl(R-2\Lambda\bigr)
-\frac{1}{4}F_{\mu\nu}^{a}F_{a}^{\mu\nu}
-\frac{1}{2}g^{\mu\nu}
(D_{\mu}\phi)^{\dagger}D_{\nu}\phi
\\[4pt]
&\qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad
-\frac{m_{\phi}^{2}c^{2}}{2\hbar^{2}}\phi^{\dagger}\phi
-\frac{\lambda}{4!}\left(\phi^{\dagger}\phi\right)^{2}
+\bar{\psi}
\left(
i\hbar c\,\gamma^{\mu}
\left[
\nabla_{\mu}
-\frac{ig}{\hbar c}A_{\mu}^{a}T^{a}
\right]
-m_{\psi}c^{2}
\right)\psi
\\[4pt]
&\qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad
+J_{a}^{\mu}A_{\mu}^{a}
+J_{\phi}^{\dagger}\phi
+\phi^{\dagger}J_{\phi}
+\bar{\eta}\psi
+\bar{\psi}\eta
\Bigg)
+\frac{1}{\kappa}
\int_{\partial\mathcal{M}}
d^{3}y\,\sqrt{|h|}\,K
\Bigg]
\Bigg\},
\\[6pt]
F_{\mu\nu}^{a}
&=
\partial_{\mu}A_{\nu}^{a}
-\partial_{\nu}A_{\mu}^{a}
+g f^{abc}A_{\mu}^{b}A_{\nu}^{c},
\qquad
\kappa=\frac{8\pi G}{c^{4}}.
\end{aligned}
}
